criteria.name: entry_point_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies the exported defu() function as the entry point, created via createDefu().
criteria.groundTruth: src/defu.ts exports the defu function, which is created by calling createDefu() without a custom merger

criteria.name: merge_function_traced
criteria.description: Traces the internal _defu function that performs recursive property-by-property merging.
criteria.groundTruth: defu calls _defu which recursively merges: iterates baseObject keys, skips __proto__/constructor, skips null/undefined values, and assigns or recurses based on type

criteria.name: array_handling_explained
criteria.description: Explains how arrays are handled during merge — arrays are concatenated (base first, then defaults), not replaced.
criteria.groundTruth: When both value and object[key] are arrays, they are concatenated: object[key] = [...value, ...object[key]] — base array values come first

criteria.name: custom_merger_support
criteria.description: Mentions custom merger function support via createDefu(merger), and variants like defuFn and defuArrayFn.
criteria.groundTruth: createDefu accepts an optional merger function; if merger returns true, the default handling is skipped. defuFn and defuArrayFn are variants that support function-valued properties
